Ducat.name: Ducat
Ducat.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Coffers'''
'''+1 Buy'''
When you gain this, you may trash a Copper from your hand.

Alchemist.name: Alchemist
Alchemist.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''
'''+1 Action'''

At the start of Clean-up this turn, if you have a Potion in play, you may put this onto your deck.

Apothecary.name: Apothecary
Apothecary.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the Coppers and Potions into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

Apprentice.name: Apprentice
Apprentice.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Trash a card from your hand.
'''+1 Card''' per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] it costs.
'''+2 Cards''' if it has [[File:Potion.png|10px|link=Potion|alt=P]] in its cost.

Golem.name: Golem
Golem.instructionsHTML: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal 2 Action cards other than Golems. Discard the other cards, then play the Action cards in either order.

Herbalist.name: Herbalist
Herbalist.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]'''

Once this turn, when you discard a Treasure from play, you may put it onto your deck.

Philosopher's Stone.name: Philosopher's Stone
Philosopher's Stone.instructionsHTML: Count your deck and discard pile. '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]''' per 5 cards total between them (round down).

Possession.name: Possession
Possession.instructionsHTML: The player to your left takes an extra turn after this one (but not a 2nd extra turn in a row), in which you can see all cards they can and make all decisions for them. Any cards or [[File:Debt.png|18px|link=Debt|alt=D]] they would gain on that turn, you gain instead; any cards of theirs that are trashed are set aside and put in their discard pile at end of turn.

Scrying Pool.name: Scrying Pool
Scrying Pool.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Each player (including you) reveals the top card of their deck and either discards it or puts it back, your choice. Then reveal cards from your deck until revealing one that isn't an Action. Put all of those revealed cards into your hand.

Transmute.name: Transmute
Transmute.instructionsHTML:
Trash a card from your hand. If it is an…

Action card, gain a Duchy
Treasure card, gain a Transmute
Victory card, gain a Gold

University.name: University
University.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Actions'''

You may gain an Action card costing up to [[File:Coin5.png|16px|link=|alt=$5]].

Vineyard.name: Vineyard
Vineyard.instructionsHTML: Worth '''1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per 3 Action cards you have (rounded down).

Adventurer.name: Adventurer
Adventurer.instructionsHTML: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal 2 Treasure cards. Put those Treasure cards into your hand and discard the other revealed cards.

Artisan.name: Artisan
Artisan.instructionsHTML:
Gain a card to your hand costing up to [[File:Coin5.png|16px|link=|alt=$5]].

Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

Bandit.name: Bandit
Bandit.instructionsHTML: Gain a Gold. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes a revealed Treasure other than Copper, and discards the rest.

Bureaucrat.name: Bureaucrat
Bureaucrat.instructionsHTML: Gain a Silver onto your deck. Each other player reveals a Victory card from their hand and puts it onto their deck (or reveals a hand with no Victory cards).

Cellar.name: Cellar
Cellar.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Discard any number of cards. '''+1 Card''' per card discarded.

Chancellor.name: Chancellor
Chancellor.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

You may immediately put your deck into your discard pile.

Chapel.name: Chapel
Chapel.instructionsHTML: Trash up to 4 cards from your hand.

Feast.name: Feast
Feast.instructionsHTML: Trash this card. Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin5.png|16px|link=|alt=$5]].

Gardens.name: Gardens
Gardens.instructionsHTML: Worth '''1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per 10 cards you have (round down).

Harbinger.name: Harbinger
Harbinger.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Look through your discard pile. You may put a card from it onto your deck.

Library.name: Library
Library.instructionsHTML: Draw until you have 7 cards in hand, skipping any Action cards you choose to; set those aside, discarding them afterwards.

Merchant.name: Merchant
Merchant.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

The first time you play a Silver this turn, '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]'''.

Militia.name: Militia
Militia.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

Mine.name: Mine
Mine.instructionsHTML: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. Gain a Treasure to your hand costing up to [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]] more than it.

Moat.name: Moat
Moat.instructionsHTML: '''+2 Cards'''<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />When another player plays an Attack card, you may first reveal this from your hand, to be unaffected by it.

Moneylender.name: Moneylender
Moneylender.instructionsHTML: You may trash a Copper from your hand for '''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]'''.

Poacher.name: Poacher
Poacher.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]'''

Discard a card per empty Supply pile.

Sentry.name: Sentry
Sentry.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Trash and/or discard any number of them. Put the rest back on top in any order.

Spy.name: Spy
Spy.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Each player (including you) reveals the top card of their deck and either discards it or puts it back, your choice.

Thief.name: Thief
Thief.instructionsHTML: Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck. If they revealed any Treasure cards, they trash one of them that you choose. You may gain any or all of these trashed cards. They discard the other revealed cards.

Throne Room.name: Throne Room
Throne Room.instructionsHTML: You may play an Action card from your hand twice.

Vassal.name: Vassal
Vassal.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

Discard the top card of your deck. If it's an Action card, you may play it.

Workshop.name: Workshop
Workshop.instructionsHTML: Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]].

Border Guard.name: Border Guard
Border Guard.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and discard the other. If both were Actions, take the Lantern or Horn.

Experiment.name: Experiment
Experiment.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''
'''+1 Action'''

Return this to its pile.

When you gain this, gain another Experiment (that doesn't come with another).

Flag Bearer.name: Flag Bearer
Flag Bearer.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''
When you gain or trash this, take the Flag.

Hideout.name: Hideout
Hideout.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+2 Actions'''

Trash a card from your hand. If it's a Victory card, gain a Curse.

Improve.name: Improve
Improve.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

At the start of Clean-up, you may trash an Action card you would discard from play this turn, to gain a card costing exactly [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] more than it.

Inventor.name: Inventor
Inventor.instructionsHTML: Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]], then cards cost [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] less this turn.

Mountain Village.name: Mountain Village
Mountain Village.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Actions'''

Look through your discard pile and put a card from it into your hand; if you can't, '''+1 Card'''.

Old Witch.name: Old Witch
Old Witch.instructionsHTML:
'''+3 Cards'''

Each other player gains a Curse and may trash a Curse from their hand.

Patron.name: Patron
Patron.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Villager'''
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''
When something causes you to reveal this (using the word "reveal") in an Action phase, '''+1 Coffers'''.

Priest.name: Priest
Priest.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

Trash a card from your hand. For the rest of this turn, when you trash a card, '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''.

Recruiter.name: Recruiter
Recruiter.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''

Trash a card from your hand. '''+1 Villager''' per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] it costs.

Research.name: Research
Research.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Trash a card from your hand. Per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] it costs, set aside a card from your deck face down (on this). At the start of your next turn, put those cards into your hand.

Scepter.name: Scepter
Scepter.instructionsHTML: Choose one: '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''; or replay a non-Command Action card you played this turn that's still in play.

Sculptor.name: Sculptor
Sculptor.instructionsHTML: Gain a card to your hand costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]. If it's a Treasure, '''+1 Villager'''.

Seer.name: Seer
Seer.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Put the ones costing from [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]] to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]] into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

Silk Merchant.name: Silk Merchant
Silk Merchant.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''
'''+1 Buy'''
When you gain or trash this, '''+1 Coffers''' and '''+1 Villager'''.

Swashbuckler.name: Swashbuckler
Swashbuckler.instructionsHTML:
'''+3 Cards'''

If your discard pile has any cards in it: '''+1 Coffers''', then if you have at least 4 Coffers tokens, take the Treasure Chest.

Treasurer.name: Treasurer
Treasurer.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]'''

Choose one: Trash a Treasure from your hand; or gain a Treasure from the trash to your hand; or take the Key.

Villain.name: Villain
Villain.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Coffers'''

Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards one costing [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]] or more (or reveals they can't).

Academy.name: Academy
Academy.instructionsHTML: When you gain an Action card, '''+1 Villager'''.

Barracks.name: Barracks
Barracks.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, '''+1 Action'''.

Canal.name: Canal
Canal.instructionsHTML: During your turns, cards cost [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] less.

Capitalism.name: Capitalism
Capitalism.instructionsHTML: During your turns, Actions with '''+[[File:Coin.png|16px|link=|alt=$]]''' amounts in their text are also Treasures.

Cathedral.name: Cathedral
Cathedral.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, trash a card from your hand.

Citadel.name: Citadel
Citadel.instructionsHTML: The first time you play an Action card during each of your turns, replay it afterwards.

City Gate.name: City Gate
City Gate.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, '''+1 Card''', then put a card from your hand onto your deck.

Crop Rotation.name: Crop Rotation
Crop Rotation.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, you may discard a Victory card for '''+2 Cards'''.

Exploration.name: Exploration
Exploration.instructionsHTML: At the end of your Buy phase, if you didn't gain any cards during it, '''+1 Coffers''' and '''+1 Villager'''.

Fair.name: Fair
Fair.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, '''+1 Buy'''.

Fleet.name: Fleet
Fleet.instructionsHTML: After the game ends, there's an extra round of turns just for players with this.

Innovation.name: Innovation
Innovation.instructionsHTML: Once during each of your turns, when you gain an Action card, you may play it.

Pageant.name: Pageant
Pageant.instructionsHTML: At the end of your Buy phase, you may pay [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] for '''+1 Coffers'''.

Piazza.name: Piazza
Piazza.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an Action, play it.

Road Network.name: Road Network
Road Network.instructionsHTML: When another player gains a Victory card, '''+1 Card'''.

Sewers.name: Sewers
Sewers.instructionsHTML: When you trash a card other than with this, you may trash a card from your hand.

Silos.name: Silos
Silos.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, discard any number of Coppers, revealed, and draw that many cards.

Sinister Plot.name: Sinister Plot
Sinister Plot.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, add a token here, or remove your tokens here for '''+1 Card''' each.

Star Chart.name: Star Chart
Star Chart.instructionsHTML: When shuffling, you may pick one of the cards to go on top.

Horn.name: Horn
Horn.instructionsHTML: Once per turn, when you discard a Border Guard from play, you may put it onto your deck.

Key.name: Key
Key.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]'''.

Lantern.name: Lantern
Lantern.instructionsHTML: Border Guards you play reveal 3 cards and discard 2. (It takes all 3 being Actions to take the Horn.)

Treasure Chest.name: Treasure Chest
Treasure Chest.instructionsHTML: At the start of your Buy phase, gain a Gold.

Duchess.name: Duchess
Duchess.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

Each player (including you) looks at the top card of their deck and may discard it.

In games using this, when you gain a Duchy, you may gain a Duchess.

Embassy.name: Embassy
Embassy.instructionsHTML:
'''+5 Cards'''

Discard 3 cards.

When you gain this, each other player gains a Silver.

Ill-Gotten Gains.name: Ill-Gotten Gains
Ill-Gotten Gains.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]

You may gain a Copper to your hand.

When you gain this, each other player gains a Curse.

Mandarin.name: Mandarin
Mandarin.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]'''

Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

When you gain this, put all Treasures you have in play onto your deck in any order.

Berserker.name: Berserker
Berserker.instructionsHTML: Gain a card costing less than this. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />When you gain this, if you have an Action in play, play this.

Border Village.name: Border Village
Border Village.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+2 Actions'''
When you gain this, gain a cheaper card.

Cartographer.name: Cartographer
Cartographer.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Discard any number of them, then put the rest back in any order.

Cauldron.name: Cauldron
Cauldron.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin2.png|32px|link=|alt=$2]]
'''+1 Buy'''

The third time you gain an Action this turn, each other player gains a Curse.

Crossroads.name: Crossroads
Crossroads.instructionsHTML: Reveal your hand. '''+1 Card''' per Victory card revealed. If this is the first time you played a Crossroads this turn, '''+3 Actions'''.

Develop.name: Develop
Develop.instructionsHTML: Trash a card from your hand. Gain two cards onto your deck, with one costing exactly [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] more than it, and one costing exactly [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] less than it, in either order.

Guard Dog.name: Guard Dog
Guard Dog.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''

If you have 5 or fewer cards in hand, '''+2 Cards'''.

When another player plays an Attack, you may first play this from your hand.

Inn.name: Inn
Inn.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards
+2 Actions'''

Discard 2 cards.

When you gain this, reveal any number of Action cards from your discard pile and shuffle them into your deck.

Margrave.name: Margrave
Margrave.instructionsHTML:
'''+3 Cards'''
'''+1 Buy'''

Each other player draws a card, then discards down to 3 cards in hand.

Noble Brigand.name: Noble Brigand
Noble Brigand.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]'''

Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes a revealed Silver or Gold you choose, discards the rest, and gains a Copper if they didn't reveal a Treasure. You gain the trashed cards.

When you buy this, do its attack.

Nomad Camp.name: Nomad Camp
Nomad Camp.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''
This is gained onto your deck (instead of to your discard pile).

Nomads.name: Nomads
Nomads.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''
When you gain or trash this, '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''.

Oracle.name: Oracle
Oracle.instructionsHTML: Each player (including you) reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, and discards them or puts them back, your choice (they choose the order). Then, '''+2 Cards'''.

Scheme.name: Scheme
Scheme.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

This turn, you may put one of your Action cards onto your deck when you discard it from play.

Silk Road.name: Silk Road
Silk Road.instructionsHTML: Worth '''1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] for every 4 Victory cards you have (round down).

Souk.name: Souk
Souk.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''
'''+[[File:Coin7.png|16px|link=|alt=$7]]'''

–[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] per card in your hand (you can't go below [[File:Coin0.png|16px|link=|alt=$0]]).

When you gain this, trash up to 2 cards from your hand.

Stables.name: Stables
Stables.instructionsHTML: You may discard a Treasure, for '''+3 Cards''' and '''+1 Action'''.

Trader.name: Trader
Trader.instructionsHTML:
Trash a card from your hand. Gain a Silver per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] it costs.
When you gain a card, you may reveal this from your hand, to exchange the card for a Silver.

Farmland.name: Farmland
Farmland.instructionsHTML:
2 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]
When you gain this, trash a card from your hand and gain a non-Farmland card costing exactly [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]] more than it.

Fool's Gold.name: Fool's Gold
Fool's Gold.instructionsHTML:
If this is the first time you played a Fool's Gold this turn, '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]''', otherwise '''+[[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]'''.
When another player gains a Province, you may trash this from your hand, to gain a Gold onto your deck.

Haggler.name: Haggler
Haggler.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

This turn, when you gain a card, if you bought it, gain a cheaper non-Victory card.

Tunnel.name: Tunnel
Tunnel.instructionsHTML:
2 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]
When you discard this other than during Clean-up, you may reveal it to gain a Gold.

Weaver.name: Weaver
Weaver.instructionsHTML:
Gain two Silvers or a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]].
When you discard this other than in Clean-up, you may play it.

Wheelwright.name: Wheelwright
Wheelwright.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

You may discard a card to gain an Action card costing as much as it or less.

Witch's Hut.name: Witch's Hut
Witch's Hut.instructionsHTML:
'''+4 Cards'''

Discard 2 cards, revealed. If they're both Actions, each other player gains a Curse.

Blessed Village.name: Blessed Village
Blessed Village.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+2 Actions'''
When you gain this, take a Boon. Receive it now or at the start of your next turn.

Cemetery.name: Cemetery
Cemetery.instructionsHTML:
2 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]

When you gain this, trash up to 4 cards from your hand.

''Heirloom: Haunted Mirror''

Changeling.name: Changeling
Changeling.instructionsHTML:
Trash this. Gain a copy of a card you have in play.
In games using this, when you gain a card costing [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]] or more, you may exchange it for a Changeling.

Cobbler.name: Cobbler
Cobbler.instructionsHTML: At the start of your next turn, gain a card to your hand costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]].

Conclave.name: Conclave
Conclave.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

You may play an Action card from your hand that you don't have a copy of in play. If you do, '''+1 Action'''.

Crypt.name: Crypt
Crypt.instructionsHTML: Set aside any number of non-Duration Treasures you have in play, face down (under this). While any remain, at the start of each of your turns, put one of them into your hand.

Cursed Village.name: Cursed Village
Cursed Village.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Actions'''

Draw until you have 6 cards in hand.

When you gain this, receive a Hex.

Den of Sin.name: Den of Sin
Den of Sin.instructionsHTML: At the start of your next turn, '''+2 Cards.'''<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

Devil's Workshop.name: Devil's Workshop
Devil's Workshop.instructionsHTML:
If the number of cards you've gained this turn is:

2+, gain an Imp;
1, gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]];
0, gain a Gold.

Druid.name: Druid
Druid.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

Receive one of the set-aside Boons (leaving it there).

Setup: Set aside the top 3 Boons face up.

Exorcist.name: Exorcist
Exorcist.instructionsHTML: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a cheaper Spirit from one of the Spirit piles.

Faithful Hound.name: Faithful Hound
Faithful Hound.instructionsHTML: '''+2 Cards'''<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />When you discard this other than during Clean-up, you may set it aside, and put it into your hand at end of turn.

Fool.name: Fool
Fool.instructionsHTML:
If you aren't the player with Lost in the Woods: take it, take 3 Boons, and receive the Boons in any order.

''Heirloom: Lucky Coin''

Ghost Town.name: Ghost Town
Ghost Town.instructionsHTML: At the start of your next turn, '''+1 Card''' and '''+1 Action'''.<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

Guardian.name: Guardian
Guardian.instructionsHTML:
At the start of your next turn, '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]'''.
Until then, when another player plays an Attack card, it doesn't affect you.
This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

Idol.name: Idol
Idol.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin2.png|32px|link=|alt=$2]]

If you have an odd number of Idols in play (counting this), receive a Boon; otherwise, each other player gains a Curse.

Leprechaun.name: Leprechaun
Leprechaun.instructionsHTML: Gain a Gold. If you have exactly 7 cards in play, gain a Wish. Otherwise, receive a Hex.

Monastery.name: Monastery
Monastery.instructionsHTML: For each card you've gained this turn, you may trash a card from your hand or a Copper you have in play.

Necromancer.name: Necromancer
Necromancer.instructionsHTML: Choose a face up, non-Duration Action card in the trash. Turn it face down for the turn, and play it, leaving it there.<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />Setup: Put the 3 Zombies into the trash.

Night Watchman.name: Night Watchman
Night Watchman.instructionsHTML: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck, discard any number, and put the rest back in any order.<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

Pixie.name: Pixie
Pixie.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Discard the top Boon. You may trash this to receive that Boon twice.

''Heirloom: Goat''

Pooka.name: Pooka
Pooka.instructionsHTML:
You may trash a Treasure other than Cursed Gold from your hand, for '''+4 Cards'''.

''Heirloom: Cursed Gold''

Raider.name: Raider
Raider.instructionsHTML:
Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards a copy of a card you have in play (or reveals they can't).

At the start of your next turn, '''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]'''.

Sacred Grove.name: Sacred Grove
Sacred Grove.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''
'''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]'''

Receive a Boon. If it doesn't give '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]''', each other player may receive it.

Secret Cave.name: Secret Cave
Secret Cave.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

You may discard 3 cards. If you did, then at the start of your next turn, '''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]'''.

''Heirloom: Magic Lamp''

Shepherd.name: Shepherd
Shepherd.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Discard any number of Victory cards, revealing them. '''+2 Cards''' per card discarded.

''Heirloom: Pasture''

Skulk.name: Skulk
Skulk.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

Each other player receives the next Hex.

When you gain this, gain a Gold.

Tormentor.name: Tormentor
Tormentor.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

If you have no other cards in play, gain an Imp. Otherwise, each other player receives the next Hex.

Tragic Hero.name: Tragic Hero
Tragic Hero.instructionsHTML:
'''+3 Cards'''
'''+1 Buy'''

If you have 8 or more cards in hand (after drawing), trash this and gain a Treasure.

Vampire.name: Vampire
Vampire.instructionsHTML:
Each other player receives the next Hex.

Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin5.png|16px|link=|alt=$5]] other than a Vampire.

Exchange this for a Bat.

Werewolf.name: Werewolf
Werewolf.instructionsHTML: If it's your Night phase, each other player receives the next Hex. Otherwise, '''+3 Cards'''.

Bat.name: Bat
Bat.instructionsHTML:
Trash up to 2 cards from your hand. If you trashed at least one, exchange this for a Vampire.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Ghost.name: Ghost
Ghost.instructionsHTML:
Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal an Action. Discard the other cards and set aside the Action. At the start of your next turn, play it twice.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Goat.name: Goat
Goat.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]

You may trash a card from your hand.

Haunted Mirror.name: Haunted Mirror
Haunted Mirror.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]
When you trash this, you may discard an Action card, to gain a Ghost.

Imp.name: Imp
Imp.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''

You may play an Action card from your hand that you don't have a copy of in play.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Magic Lamp.name: Magic Lamp
Magic Lamp.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]

If there are at least 6 cards that you have exactly 1 copy of in play (counting this), trash this. If you did, gain 3 Wishes.

Pasture.name: Pasture
Pasture.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]
Worth '''1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per Estate you have.

Will-o'-Wisp.name: Will-o'-Wisp
Will-o'-Wisp.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]] or less, put it into your hand.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Wish.name: Wish
Wish.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Return this to its pile. If you did, gain a card to your hand costing up to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]].

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Zombie Apprentice.name: Zombie Apprentice
Zombie Apprentice.instructionsHTML: You may trash an Action card from your hand for '''+3 Cards''' and '''+1 Action'''.

Zombie Mason.name: Zombie Mason
Zombie Mason.instructionsHTML: Trash the top card of your deck. You may gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] more than it.

Zombie Spy.name: Zombie Spy
Zombie Spy.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Look at the top card of your deck. Discard it or put it back.

Bad Omens.name: Bad Omens
Bad Omens.instructionsHTML: Put your deck into your discard pile. Look through it and put 2 Coppers from it onto your deck (or reveal you can't).

Deluded.name: Deluded
Deluded.instructionsHTML: At the start of your Buy phase, return this, and you can't buy Actions this turn.

Delusion.name: Delusion
Delusion.instructionsHTML: If you don't have Deluded or Envious, take Deluded.

The Earth's Gift.name: The Earth's Gift
The Earth's Gift.instructionsHTML: You may discard a Treasure to gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]].

Envious.name: Envious
Envious.instructionsHTML: At the start of your Buy phase, return this, and Silver and Gold make [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] this turn.

Envy.name: Envy
Envy.instructionsHTML: If you don't have Deluded or Envious, take Envious.

Famine.name: Famine
Famine.instructionsHTML: Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Discard the Actions. Shuffle the rest into your deck.

Fear.name: Fear
Fear.instructionsHTML: If you have at least 5 cards in hand, discard an Action or Treasure (or reveal you can't).

The Flame's Gift.name: The Flame's Gift
The Flame's Gift.instructionsHTML: You may trash a card from your hand.

Greed.name: Greed
Greed.instructionsHTML: Gain a Copper onto your deck.

Haunting.name: Haunting
Haunting.instructionsHTML: If you have at least 4 cards in hand, put one of them onto your deck.

Lost in the Woods.name: Lost in the Woods
Lost in the Woods.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, you may discard a card to receive a Boon.

Locusts.name: Locusts
Locusts.instructionsHTML: Trash the top card of your deck. If it's Copper or Estate, gain a Curse. Otherwise, gain a cheaper card that shares a type with it.

Miserable.name: Miserable
Miserable.instructionsHTML: -2 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]

Misery.name: Misery
Misery.instructionsHTML: If this is your first Misery this game, take Miserable. Otherwise, flip it over to Twice Miserable.

The Moon's Gift.name: The Moon's Gift
The Moon's Gift.instructionsHTML: Look through your discard pile. You may put a card from it onto your deck.

Plague.name: Plague
Plague.instructionsHTML: Gain a Curse to your hand.

The River's Gift.name: The River's Gift
The River's Gift.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card''' at the end of this turn.

''(Keep this until Clean-up.)''

The Sky's Gift.name: The Sky's Gift
The Sky's Gift.instructionsHTML: You may discard 3 cards to gain a Gold.

The Sun's Gift.name: The Sun's Gift
The Sun's Gift.instructionsHTML: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Discard any number of them and put the rest back in any order.

Twice Miserable.name: Twice Miserable
Twice Miserable.instructionsHTML: -4 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]

War.name: War
War.instructionsHTML: Reveal cards from your deck until revealing one costing [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]] or [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]. Trash it and discard the rest.

Barbarian.name: Barbarian
Barbarian.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

Each other player trashes the top card of their deck. If it costs [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]] or more they gain a cheaper card sharing a type with it; otherwise they gain a Curse.

Bauble.name: Bauble
Bauble.instructionsHTML: Choose two different options: '''+1 Buy'''; '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]'''; '''+1 Favor'''; this turn, when you gain a card, you may put it onto your deck.

Broker.name: Broker
Broker.instructionsHTML:
Trash a card from your hand and choose one:
'''+1 Card''' per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] it costs;
or '''+1 Action''' per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] it costs;
or '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]''' per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] it costs;
or '''+1 Favor''' per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] it costs.

Capital City.name: Capital City
Capital City.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+2 Actions'''

You may discard 2 cards for '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''.

You may pay [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]] for '''+2 Cards'''.

Carpenter.name: Carpenter
Carpenter.instructionsHTML:
If no Supply piles are empty, '''+1 Action''' and gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]].

Otherwise, trash a card from your hand and gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]] more than it.

Contract.name: Contract
Contract.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin2.png|32px|link=|alt=$2]]
'''+1 Favor'''

You may set aside an Action from your hand to play it at the start of your next turn.

Courier.name: Courier
Courier.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]'''

Discard the top card of your deck. Look through your discard pile; you may play an Action or Treasure from it.

Emissary.name: Emissary
Emissary.instructionsHTML:
'''+3 Cards'''

If this made you shuffle (at least one card), '''+1 Action''' and '''+2 Favors'''.

Galleria.name: Galleria
Galleria.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]'''

This turn, when you gain a card costing [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]] or [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]], '''+1 Buy'''.

Guildmaster.name: Guildmaster
Guildmaster.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]'''

This turn, when you gain a card, '''+1 Favor'''.

Highwayman.name: Highwayman
Highwayman.instructionsHTML:
At the start of your next turn, discard this from play and '''+3 Cards'''.

Until then, the first Treasure each other player plays each turn does nothing.

Hunter.name: Hunter
Hunter.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. From those cards, put an Action, a Treasure, and a Victory card into your hand. Discard the rest.

Importer.name: Importer
Importer.instructionsHTML:
At the start of your next turn, gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin5.png|16px|link=|alt=$5]].
Setup: Each player gets '''+4 Favors'''.

Innkeeper.name: Innkeeper
Innkeeper.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Choose one: '''+1 Card'''; or '''+3 Cards''', then discard 3 cards; or '''+5 Cards''', then discard 6 cards.

Marquis.name: Marquis
Marquis.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

'''+1 Card''' per card in your hand. Discard down to 10 cards in hand.

Merchant Camp.name: Merchant Camp
Merchant Camp.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Actions'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]'''
When you discard this from play, you may put it onto your deck.

Modify.name: Modify
Modify.instructionsHTML: Trash a card from your hand. Choose one: '''+1 Card''' and '''+1 Action'''; or gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]] more than the trashed card.

Royal Galley.name: Royal Galley
Royal Galley.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''

You may play a non-Duration Action card from your hand. Set it aside; if you did, then at the start of your next turn, play it.

Sentinel.name: Sentinel
Sentinel.instructionsHTML: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may trash up to 2 of them. Put the rest back in any order.

Skirmisher.name: Skirmisher
Skirmisher.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]'''

This turn, when you gain an Attack card, each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

Specialist.name: Specialist
Specialist.instructionsHTML: You may play an Action or Treasure from your hand. Choose one: Play it again; or gain a copy of it.

Swap.name: Swap
Swap.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

You may return an Action from your hand to its pile, to gain to your hand a different Action costing up to [[File:Coin5.png|16px|link=|alt=$5]].

Sycophant.name: Sycophant
Sycophant.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Discard 3 cards. If you discarded at least one, '''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]'''.

When you gain or trash this, '''+2 Favors'''.

Town.name: Town
Town.instructionsHTML: Choose one: '''+1 Card''' and '''+2 Actions'''; or '''+1 Buy''' and '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''.

Acolyte.name: Acolyte
Acolyte.instructionsHTML:
You may trash an Action or Victory card from your hand to gain a Gold.

You may trash this to gain an Augur.

Archer.name: Archer
Archer.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand reveals all but one, and discards one of those you choose.

Battle Plan.name: Battle Plan
Battle Plan.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

You may reveal an Attack card from your hand for '''+1 Card'''.

You may rotate any Supply pile.

Conjurer.name: Conjurer
Conjurer.instructionsHTML:
Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]].

At the start of your next turn, put this into your hand.

Distant Shore.name: Distant Shore
Distant Shore.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''
'''+1 Action'''

Gain an Estate.

2 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]

Elder.name: Elder
Elder.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

You may play an Action card from your hand. When it gives you a choice of abilities (with "choose") this turn, you may choose an extra (different) option.

Garrison.name: Garrison
Garrison.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

This turn, when you gain a card, add a token here. At the start of your next turn, remove them for '''+1 Card''' each.

Herb Gatherer.name: Herb Gatherer
Herb Gatherer.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

Put your deck into your discard pile. Look through it and you may play a Treasure from it.

You may rotate the Augurs.

Hill Fort.name: Hill Fort
Hill Fort.instructionsHTML: Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]. Choose one: Put it into your hand; or '''+1 Card''' and '''+1 Action'''.

Lich.name: Lich
Lich.instructionsHTML:
'''+6 Cards'''
'''+2 Actions'''

Skip a turn.

When you trash this, discard it and gain a cheaper card from the trash.

Miller.name: Miller
Miller.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and discard the rest.

Old Map.name: Old Map
Old Map.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Discard a card. '''+1 Card'''.

You may rotate the Odysseys.

Sibyl.name: Sibyl
Sibyl.instructionsHTML:
'''+4 Cards'''
'''+1 Action'''

Put a card from your hand on top of your deck, and another on the bottom.

Sorcerer.name: Sorcerer
Sorcerer.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Each other player names a card, then reveals the top card of their deck. If wrong, they gain a Curse.

Sorceress.name: Sorceress
Sorceress.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Name a card. Reveal the top card of your deck and put it into your hand. If it's the named card, each other player gains a Curse.

Stronghold.name: Stronghold
Stronghold.instructionsHTML:
Choose one: '''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]'''; or at the start of your next turn, '''+3 Cards'''.
2 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]

Student.name: Student
Student.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

You may rotate the Wizards.

Trash a card from your hand. If it's a Treasure, '''+1 Favor''' and put this onto your deck.

Sunken Treasure.name: Sunken Treasure
Sunken Treasure.instructionsHTML: Gain an Action card you don't have a copy of in play.

Blacksmith.name: Blacksmith
Blacksmith.instructionsHTML: Choose one: Draw until you have 6 cards in hand; or '''+2 Cards'''; or '''+1 Card''' and '''+1 Action'''.

Tent.name: Tent
Tent.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

You may rotate the Forts.

When you discard this from play, you may put it onto your deck.

Territory.name: Territory
Territory.instructionsHTML:
Worth 1 [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per differently named Victory card you have.
When you gain this, gain a Gold per empty Supply pile.

Town Crier.name: Town Crier
Town Crier.instructionsHTML:
Choose one: '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''; or gain a Silver; or '''+1 Card''' and '''+1 Action'''.

You may rotate the Townsfolk.

Voyage.name: Voyage
Voyage.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Take an extra turn after this one (but not a 3rd turn in a row), during which you can only play 3 cards from your hand.

Warlord.name: Warlord
Warlord.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

At the start of your next turn, '''+2 Cards'''. Until then, other players can't play an Action from their hand that they have 2 or more copies of in play.

Architects' Guild.name: Architects' Guild
Architects' Guild.instructionsHTML: When you gain a card, you may spend '''2 Favors''' to gain a cheaper non-Victory card.

Band of Nomads.name: Band of Nomads
Band of Nomads.instructionsHTML: When you gain a card costing [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]] or more, you may spend a '''Favor''', for '''+1 Card''', or '''+1 Action''', or '''+1 Buy'''.

Cave Dwellers.name: Cave Dwellers
Cave Dwellers.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, you may spend a '''Favor''', to discard a card then draw a card. Repeat as desired.

Circle of Witches.name: Circle of Witches
Circle of Witches.instructionsHTML: After playing a Liaison, you may spend '''3 Favors''' to have each other player gain a Curse.

City-state.name: City-state
City-state.instructionsHTML: When you gain an Action card during your turn, you may spend '''2 Favors''' to play it.

Coastal Haven.name: Coastal Haven
Coastal Haven.instructionsHTML: When discarding your hand in Clean-up, you may spend any number of '''Favors''' to keep that many cards in hand for next turn (you still draw 5).

Crafters' Guild.name: Crafters' Guild
Crafters' Guild.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, you may spend '''2 Favors''' to gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]] onto your deck.

Desert Guides.name: Desert Guides
Desert Guides.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, you may spend a '''Favor''' to discard your hand and draw 5 cards. Repeat as desired.

Family of Inventors.name: Family of Inventors
Family of Inventors.instructionsHTML: At the start of your Buy phase, you may put a '''Favor''' token you have on a non-Victory Supply pile. Cards cost [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] less per '''Favor''' token on their piles.

Fellowship of Scribes.name: Fellowship of Scribes
Fellowship of Scribes.instructionsHTML: After playing an Action, if you have 4 or fewer cards in hand, you may spend a '''Favor''' for '''+1 Card'''.

Forest Dwellers.name: Forest Dwellers
Forest Dwellers.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, you may spend a '''Favor''' to look at the top 3 cards of your deck, discard any number and put the rest back in any order.

Gang of Pickpockets.name: Gang of Pickpockets
Gang of Pickpockets.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, discard down to 4 cards in hand unless you spend a '''Favor'''.

Island Folk.name: Island Folk
Island Folk.instructionsHTML: At the end of your turn, you may spend '''5 Favors''' to take an extra turn after this one (but not a 3rd turn in a row).

League of Bankers.name: League of Bankers
League of Bankers.instructionsHTML: At the start of your Buy phase, '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]''' per '''4 Favors''' you have (round down).

League of Shopkeepers.name: League of Shopkeepers
League of Shopkeepers.instructionsHTML: After playing a Liaison, if you have '''5''' or more '''Favors''', '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]''', and if '''10''' or more, '''+1 Action''' and '''+1 Buy'''.

Market Towns.name: Market Towns
Market Towns.instructionsHTML: At the start of your Buy phase, you may spend a '''Favor''' to play an Action card from your hand. Repeat as desired.

Mountain Folk.name: Mountain Folk
Mountain Folk.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, you may spend '''5 Favors''' for '''+3 Cards'''.

Order of Astrologers.name: Order of Astrologers
Order of Astrologers.instructionsHTML: When shuffling, you may pick one card per '''Favor''' you spend to go on top.

Order of Masons.name: Order of Masons
Order of Masons.instructionsHTML: When shuffling, you may pick up to 2 cards per '''Favor''' you spend to put into your discard pile.

Peaceful Cult.name: Peaceful Cult
Peaceful Cult.instructionsHTML: At the start of your Buy phase, you may spend any number of '''Favors''' to trash that many cards from your hand.

Plateau Shepherds.name: Plateau Shepherds
Plateau Shepherds.instructionsHTML: When scoring, pair up your '''Favors''' with cards you have costing [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]], for '''2''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per pair.

Trappers' Lodge.name: Trappers' Lodge
Trappers' Lodge.instructionsHTML: When you gain a card, you may spend a '''Favor''' to put it onto your deck.

Woodworkers' Guild.name: Woodworkers' Guild
Woodworkers' Guild.instructionsHTML: At the start of your Buy phase, you may spend a '''Favor''' to trash an Action card from your hand. If you did, gain an Action card.

Avanto.name: Avanto
Avanto.instructionsHTML:
'''+3 Cards'''

You may play a Sauna from your hand.

Captain.name: Captain
Captain.instructionsHTML: Now and at the start of your next turn: Play a non-Duration, non-Command Action card from the Supply costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]], leaving it there.

Church.name: Church
Church.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Set aside up to 3 cards from your hand face down. At the start of your next turn, put them into your hand, then you may trash a card from your hand.

Dismantle.name: Dismantle
Dismantle.instructionsHTML: Trash a card from your hand. If it costs [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] or more, gain a cheaper card and a Gold.

Envoy.name: Envoy
Envoy.instructionsHTML: Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck. The player to your left chooses one. Discard that one and put the rest into your hand.

Governor.name: Governor
Governor.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Choose one; you get the version in parentheses: Each player gets '''+1 (+3) Cards'''; or each player gains a Silver (Gold); or each player may trash a card from their hand and gain a card costing exactly [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]] ([[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]) more.

Marchland.name: Marchland
Marchland.instructionsHTML:
Worth 1 [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per 3 Victory cards you have (round down).
When you gain this, '''+1 Buy''', and discard any number of cards for '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]''' each.

Prince.name: Prince
Prince.instructionsHTML: You may set aside (on this) a non-Duration, non-Command Action card from your hand costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]. At the start of each of your turns, play that card, leaving it set aside.

Sauna.name: Sauna
Sauna.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

You may play an Avanto from your hand.

This turn, when you play a Silver, you may trash a card from your hand.

Sauna/Avanto.name: Sauna/Avanto
Sauna/Avanto.instructionsHTML: This pile starts the game with 5 copies of Sauna on top, then 5 copies of Avanto. Only the top card of the pile can be gained or bought.

Stash.name: Stash
Stash.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin2.png|32px|link=|alt=$2]]
When shuffling this, you may look through your remaining deck, and may put this anywhere in the shuffled cards.

Walled Village.name: Walled Village
Walled Village.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+2 Actions'''
At the start of Clean-up, if you have this and no more than one other Action card in play, you may put this onto your deck.

Anvil.name: Anvil
Anvil.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]

You may discard a Treasure to gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]].

Spice Merchant.name: Spice Merchant
Spice Merchant.instructionsHTML: You may trash a Treasure from your hand to choose one: '''+2 Cards''' and '''+1 Action'''; or '''+1 Buy''' and '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''.

Clerk.name: Clerk
Clerk.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]'''

Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand puts one onto their deck.

At the start of your turn, you may play this from your hand.

Collection.name: Collection
Collection.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin2.png|32px|link=|alt=$2]]
'''+1 Buy'''

This turn, when you gain an Action card, '''+1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]].

Counting House.name: Counting House
