Taskmaster.name: Taskmaster
Taskmaster.instructionsHTML: '''+1 Action''', '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1''', and if you gain a card costing exactly [[File:Coin5.png|16px|link=|alt=$5]]$5 this turn, then at the start of your next turn, repeat this ability.

Tools.name: Tools
Tools.instructionsHTML: Gain a copy of a card anyone has in play.

Trickster.name: Trickster
Trickster.instructionsHTML: Each other player gains a Curse. Once this turn, when you discard a Treasure from play, you may set it aside. Put it in your hand at end of turn.

Wealthy Village.name: Wealthy Village
Wealthy Village.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+2 Actions'''
When you gain this, if you have at least 3 differently named Treasures in play, gain a Loot.

Amphora.name: Amphora
Amphora.instructionsHTML: Either now or at the start of your next turn: '''+1 Buy''' and '''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3'''.

Doubloons.name: Doubloons
Doubloons.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3
When you gain this, gain a Gold.

Endless Chalice.name: Endless Chalice
Endless Chalice.instructionsHTML:
Now and at the start of each of your turns for the rest of the game:
[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]$1
'''+1 Buy'''

Figurehead.name: Figurehead
Figurehead.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3

At the start of your next turn, '''+2 Cards'''.

Hammer.name: Hammer
Hammer.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3

Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4.

Insignia.name: Insignia
Insignia.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3

This turn, when you gain a card, you may put it onto your deck.

Jewels.name: Jewels
Jewels.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3
'''+1 Buy'''

At the start of your next turn, put this on the bottom of your deck.

Orb.name: Orb
Orb.instructionsHTML: Look through your discard pile. Choose one: Play an Action or Treasure from it; or '''+1 Buy''' and '''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3'''.

Prize Goat.name: Prize Goat
Prize Goat.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3
'''+1 Buy'''

You may trash a card from your hand.

Puzzle Box.name: Puzzle Box
Puzzle Box.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3
'''+1 Buy'''

You may set aside a card from your hand face down. Put it into your hand at end of turn.

Sextant.name: Sextant
Sextant.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3
'''+1 Buy'''

Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Discard any number. Put the rest back in any order.

Shield.name: Shield
Shield.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3
'''+1 Buy'''
When another player plays an Attack, you may first reveal this from your hand to be unaffected.

Spell Scroll.name: Spell Scroll
Spell Scroll.instructionsHTML: Trash this to gain a cheaper card. If it's an Action or Treasure, you may play it.

Staff.name: Staff
Staff.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3
'''+1 Buy'''

You may play an Action from your hand.

Sword.name: Sword
Sword.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3
'''+1 Buy'''

Each other player discards down to 4 cards in hand.

Avoid.name: Avoid
Avoid.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

The next time you shuffle this turn, pick up to 3 of those cards to put into your discard pile.

Deliver.name: Deliver
Deliver.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

This turn, each time you gain a card, set it aside, and put it into your hand at end of turn.

Foray.name: Foray
Foray.instructionsHTML: Discard 3 cards, revealing them. If they have 3 different names, gain a Loot.

Invasion.name: Invasion
Invasion.instructionsHTML: You may play an Attack from your hand. Gain a Duchy. Gain an Action onto your deck. Gain a Loot; play it.

Journey.name: Journey
Journey.instructionsHTML: You don't discard cards from play in Clean-up this turn. Take an extra turn after this one (but not a 3rd turn in a row).

Launch.name: Launch
Launch.instructionsHTML: Once per turn: Return to your Action phase. '''+1 Card''', '''+1 Action''', and '''+1 Buy'''.

Maelstrom.name: Maelstrom
Maelstrom.instructionsHTML: Trash 3 cards from your hand. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand trashes one of them.

Mirror.name: Mirror
Mirror.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

The next time you gain an Action card this turn, gain a copy of it.

Peril.name: Peril
Peril.instructionsHTML: You may trash an Action card from your hand to gain a Loot.

Prosper.name: Prosper
Prosper.instructionsHTML: Gain a Loot, plus any number of differently named Treasures.

Rush.name: Rush
Rush.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

The next time you gain an Action card this turn, play it.

Scrounge.name: Scrounge
Scrounge.instructionsHTML: Choose one: Trash a card from your hand; or gain an Estate from the trash, and if you did, gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin5.png|16px|link=|alt=$5]]$5.

Prepare.name: Prepare
Prepare.instructionsHTML: Set aside your hand face up. At the start of your next turn, play those Actions and Treasures in any order, then discard the rest.

Cursed.name: Cursed
Cursed.instructionsHTML: When you gain a Cursed card, gain a Loot and a Curse.

Fated.name: Fated
Fated.instructionsHTML: When shuffling, you may look through the cards and reveal Fated cards to put them on the top or bottom.

Fawning.name: Fawning
Fawning.instructionsHTML: When you gain a Province, gain a Fawning card.

Friendly.name: Friendly
Friendly.instructionsHTML: At the start of your Clean-up phase, you may discard a Friendly card to gain a Friendly card.

Hasty.name: Hasty
Hasty.instructionsHTML: When you gain a Hasty card, set it aside, and play it at the start of your next turn.

Inherited.name: Inherited
Inherited.instructionsHTML: Setup: You start the game with an Inherited card in place of a starting card you choose.

Inspiring.name: Inspiring
Inspiring.instructionsHTML: After playing an Inspiring card on your turn, you may play an Action from your hand that you don't have a copy of in play.

Nearby.name: Nearby
Nearby.instructionsHTML: When you gain a Nearby card, '''+1 Buy'''.

Patient.name: Patient
Patient.instructionsHTML: At the start of your Clean-up phase, you may set aside Patient cards from your hand to play them at the start of your next turn.

Pious.name: Pious
Pious.instructionsHTML: When you gain a Pious card, you may trash a card from your hand.

Reckless.name: Reckless
Reckless.instructionsHTML: Follow the instructions of played Reckless cards twice. When discarding one from play, return it to its pile.

Rich.name: Rich
Rich.instructionsHTML: When you gain a Rich card, gain a Silver.

Shy.name: Shy
Shy.instructionsHTML: At the start of your turn, you may discard one Shy card for '''+2 Cards'''.

Tireless.name: Tireless
Tireless.instructionsHTML: When you discard a Tireless card from play, set it aside, and put it onto your deck at end of turn.

Mystic.name: Mystic
Mystic.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If you named it, put it into your hand.

Baron.name: Baron
Baron.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

You may discard an Estate for '''+[[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4'''. If you don't, gain an Estate.

Bridge.name: Bridge
Bridge.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''

This turn, cards (everywhere) cost [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 less.

Conspirator.name: Conspirator
Conspirator.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

If you've played 3 or more Actions this turn (counting this), '''+1 Card''' and '''+1 Action'''.

Coppersmith.name: Coppersmith
Coppersmith.instructionsHTML: Copper produces an extra [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 this turn.

Courtier.name: Courtier
Courtier.instructionsHTML: Reveal a card from your hand. For each type it has (Action, Attack, etc.), choose one: '''+1 Action'''; or '''+1 Buy'''; or '''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3'''; or gain a Gold. The choices must be different.

Diplomat.name: Diplomat
Diplomat.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''

If you have 5 or fewer cards in hand (after drawing), '''+2 Actions'''.

When another player plays an Attack card, you may first reveal this from a hand of 5 or more cards, to draw 2 cards then discard 3.

Duke.name: Duke
Duke.instructionsHTML: Worth '''''1''''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per Duchy you have.

Farm.name: Farm
Farm.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin2.png|32px|link=|alt=$2]]$2
2 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]

Great Hall.name: Great Hall
Great Hall.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
1 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]

Ironworks.name: Ironworks
Ironworks.instructionsHTML:
Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4.
If the gained card is an…

Action card, '''+1 Action'''
Treasure card, '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''
Victory card, '''+1 Card'''

Lurker.name: Lurker
Lurker.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Choose one: Trash an Action card from the Supply; or gain an Action card from the trash.

Mill.name: Mill
Mill.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

You may discard 2 cards. If you do, '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''.

1 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]

Mining Village.name: Mining Village
Mining Village.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+2 Actions'''

You may trash this for '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''.

Minion.name: Minion
Minion.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Choose one: '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''; or discard your hand, '''+4 Cards''', and each other player with at least 5 cards in hand discards their hand and draws 4 cards.

Nobles.name: Nobles
Nobles.instructionsHTML:
Choose one: '''+3 Cards'''; or '''+2 Actions'''.
2 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]

Patrol.name: Patrol
Patrol.instructionsHTML:
'''+3 Cards'''

Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the Victory cards and Curses into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

Pawn.name: Pawn
Pawn.instructionsHTML: Choose two: '''+1 Card'''; '''+1 Action'''; '''+1 Buy'''; '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''. The choices must be different.

Replace.name: Replace
Replace.instructionsHTML: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 more than it. If the gained card is an Action or Treasure, put it onto your deck; if it's a Victory card, each other player gains a Curse.

Saboteur.name: Saboteur
Saboteur.instructionsHTML: Each other player reveals cards from the top of their deck until revealing one costing [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 or more. They trash that card and may gain a card costing at most [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 less than it. They discard the other revealed cards.

Scout.name: Scout
Scout.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the revealed Victory cards into your hand. Put the other cards on top of your deck in any order.

Secret Chamber.name: Secret Chamber
Secret Chamber.instructionsHTML:
Discard any number of cards. '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1''' per card discarded.
When another player plays an Attack card, you may reveal this from your hand. If you do, +2 Cards, then put 2 cards from your hand on top of your deck.

Secret Passage.name: Secret Passage
Secret Passage.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''
'''+1 Action'''

Take a card from your hand and put it anywhere in your deck.

Shanty Town.name: Shanty Town
Shanty Town.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Actions'''

Reveal your hand. If you have no Action cards in hand, '''+2 Cards'''.

Steward.name: Steward
Steward.instructionsHTML: Choose one: '''+2 Cards'''; or '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''; or trash 2 cards from your hand.

Swindler.name: Swindler
Swindler.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

Each other player trashes the top card of their deck and gains a card with the same cost that you choose.

Torturer.name: Torturer
Torturer.instructionsHTML:
'''+3 Cards'''

Each other player either discards 2 cards or gains a Curse to their hand, their choice. (They may pick an option they can't do.)

Trading Post.name: Trading Post
Trading Post.instructionsHTML: Trash 2 cards from your hand. If you did, gain a Silver to your hand.

Upgrade.name: Upgrade
Upgrade.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing exactly [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 more than it.

Wishing Well.name: Wishing Well
Wishing Well.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If you named it, put it into your hand.

Amulet.name: Amulet
Amulet.instructionsHTML: Now and at the start of your next turn, choose one: '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''; or trash a card from your hand; or gain a Silver.

Artificer.name: Artificer
Artificer.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''

Discard any number of cards. You may gain a card onto your deck, costing exactly [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 per card discarded.

Bridge Troll.name: Bridge Troll
Bridge Troll.instructionsHTML: Each other player takes their –[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 token. On this turn and your next turn, cards cost [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 less. Now and at the start of your next turn: '''+1 Buy'''.

Caravan Guard.name: Caravan Guard
Caravan Guard.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

At the start of your next turn, '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''.

When another player plays an Attack card, you may first play this from your hand.

Coin of the Realm.name: Coin of the Realm
Coin of the Realm.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]$1

Put this on your Tavern mat.

After you play an Action card, you may call this, for '''+2 Actions.'''

Distant Lands.name: Distant Lands
Distant Lands.instructionsHTML:
Put this on your Tavern mat.
Worth '''4''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] if on your Tavern mat at the end of the game (otherwise worth '''0''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]).

Dungeon.name: Dungeon
Dungeon.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Now and at the start of your next turn: '''+2 Cards''', then discard 2 Cards.

Duplicate.name: Duplicate
Duplicate.instructionsHTML:
Put this on your Tavern mat.
When you gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]]$6, you may call this, to gain a copy of that card.

Gear.name: Gear
Gear.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''

Set aside up to 2 cards from your hand face down (under this). At the start of your next turn, put them into your hand.

Haunted Woods.name: Haunted Woods
Haunted Woods.instructionsHTML:
At the start of your next turn: '''+3 Cards'''.

Until then, when any other player gains a card they bought, they put their hand onto their deck in any order.

Hireling.name: Hireling
Hireling.instructionsHTML: At the start of each of your turns for the rest of the game: '''+1 Card'''.

Messenger.name: Messenger
Messenger.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

You may put your deck into your discard pile.

When this is the first card you gain in your Buy phase, gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4, and each other player gains a copy of it.

Miser.name: Miser
Miser.instructionsHTML: Choose one: Put a Copper from your hand onto your Tavern mat; or '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1''' per Copper on your Tavern mat.

Page.name: Page
Page.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Treasure Hunter.

Peasant.name: Peasant
Peasant.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''
When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Soldier.

Port.name: Port
Port.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+2 Actions'''
When you gain this, gain another Port (that doesn't come with another).

Ratcatcher.name: Ratcatcher
Ratcatcher.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Put this on your Tavern mat.

At the start of your turn, you may call this, to trash a card from your hand.

Raze.name: Raze
Raze.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Trash this or a card from your hand. Look at one card from the top of your deck per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 the trashed card costs. Put one of them into your hand and discard the rest.

Relic.name: Relic
Relic.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin2.png|32px|link=|alt=$2]]$2

Each other player puts their –1 Card token on their deck.

Storyteller.name: Storyteller
Storyteller.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Play up to 3 Treasures from your hand. Then, '''+1 Card''', and pay all of your [[File:Coin.png|16px|link=|alt=$]]$ for '''+1 Card''' per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 you paid.

Swamp Hag.name: Swamp Hag
Swamp Hag.instructionsHTML:
At the start of your next turn: '''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3'''.

Until then, when any other player gains a card they bought, they gain a Curse.

Transmogrify.name: Transmogrify
Transmogrify.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Put this on your Tavern mat.

At the start of your turn, you may call this, to trash a card from your hand, and gain a card to your hand costing up to [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 more than it.

Treasure Trove.name: Treasure Trove
Treasure Trove.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin2.png|32px|link=|alt=$2]]$2

Gain a Gold and a Copper.

Wine Merchant.name: Wine Merchant
Wine Merchant.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''
'''+[[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4'''

Put this on your Tavern mat.

At the end of your Buy phase, if you have at least [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 unspent, you may discard this from your Tavern mat.

Disciple.name: Disciple
Disciple.instructionsHTML:
You may play an Action card from your hand twice. Gain a copy of it.
When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Teacher.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Soldier.name: Soldier
Soldier.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1''' per other Attack you have in play. Each other player with 4 or more cards in hand discards a card.

When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Fugitive.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Teacher.name: Teacher
Teacher.instructionsHTML:
Put this on your Tavern mat.
At the start of your turn, you may call this, to move your +1 Card, +1 Action, +1 Buy, or '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1''' token to an Action Supply pile you have no tokens on. (When you play a card from that pile, you first get that bonus.)

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Warrior.name: Warrior
Warrior.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''

For each Traveller you have in play (including this), each other player discards the top card of their deck and trashes it if it costs [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 or [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4.

When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Hero.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Giant.name: Giant
Giant.instructionsHTML: Turn your Journey token over (it starts face up). Then if it's face down, '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''. If it's face up, '''+[[File:Coin5.png|16px|link=|alt=$5]]$5''', and each other player reveals the top card of their deck, trashes it if it costs from [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]]$6, and otherwise discards it and gains a Curse.

Ranger.name: Ranger
Ranger.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

Turn your Journey token over (it starts face up). Then if it's face up, '''+5 Cards'''.

Alms.name: Alms
Alms.instructionsHTML: Once per turn: If you have no Treasures in play, gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4.

Ball.name: Ball
Ball.instructionsHTML: Take your –[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 token. Gain 2 cards each costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4.

Borrow.name: Borrow
Borrow.instructionsHTML: Once per turn: '''+1 Buy'''. If your –1 Card token isn't on your deck, put it there and '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''.

Expedition.name: Expedition
Expedition.instructionsHTML: Draw 2 extra cards for your next hand.

Ferry.name: Ferry
Ferry.instructionsHTML: Move your –[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 cost token to an Action Supply pile. (Cards from that pile cost [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 less on your turns.)

Inheritance.name: Inheritance
Inheritance.instructionsHTML: Once per game: Set aside a non-Command non-Duration Action card from the Supply costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4. Move your Estate token to it. (During your turns, Estates are also Command Actions with "Play the card with your Estate token, leaving it there.")

Lost Arts.name: Lost Arts
Lost Arts.instructionsHTML: Move your +1 Action token to an Action Supply pile. (When you play a card from that pile, you first get '''+1 Action'''.)

Mission.name: Mission
Mission.instructionsHTML:
Take an extra turn after this one (but not a 3rd turn in a row), during which you can't buy cards.
''(You can still buy Events.)''

Pathfinding.name: Pathfinding
Pathfinding.instructionsHTML: Move your +1 Card token to an Action Supply pile. (When you play a card from that pile, you first get '''+1 Card'''.)

Pilgrimage.name: Pilgrimage
Pilgrimage.instructionsHTML: Once per turn: Turn your Journey token over (it starts face up); then if it's face up, choose up to 3 differently named cards you have in play and gain a copy of each.

Plan.name: Plan
Plan.instructionsHTML: Move your Trashing token to an Action Supply pile. (When you gain a card from that pile, you may trash a card from your hand.)

Quest.name: Quest
Quest.instructionsHTML: You may discard an Attack, two Curses, or six cards. If you do, gain a Gold.

Raid.name: Raid
Raid.instructionsHTML: Gain a Silver per Silver you have in play. Each other player puts their –1 Card token on their deck.

Save.name: Save
Save.instructionsHTML: Once per turn: '''+1 Buy'''. Set aside a card from your hand, and put it into your hand at end of turn (after drawing).

Scouting Party.name: Scouting Party
Scouting Party.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Discard 3 and put the rest back in any order.

Seaway.name: Seaway
Seaway.instructionsHTML: Gain an Action card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4. Move your +1 Buy token to its pile. (When you play a card from that pile, you first get '''+1 Buy'''.)

Trade.name: Trade
Trade.instructionsHTML: Trash up to 2 cards from your hand. Gain a Silver per card you trashed.

Training.name: Training
Training.instructionsHTML: Move your '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1''' token to an Action Supply pile. (When you play a card from that pile, you first get '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''.)

Travelling Fair.name: Travelling Fair
Travelling Fair.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Buys'''

When you gain a card this turn, you may put it onto your deck.

Masquerade.name: Masquerade
Masquerade.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''

Each player with any cards in hand passes one to the next such player to their left, at once. Then you may trash a card from your hand.

Animal Fair.name: Animal Fair
Animal Fair.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4'''

'''+1 Buy''' per empty supply pile.

Instead of paying this card's cost, you may trash an Action card from your hand.

Barge.name: Barge
Barge.instructionsHTML: Either now or at the start of your next turn, '''+3 Cards''' and '''+1 Buy'''.

Black Cat.name: Black Cat
Black Cat.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''

If it isn't your turn, each other player gains a Curse.

When another player gains a Victory card, you may play this from your hand.

Camel Train.name: Camel Train
Camel Train.instructionsHTML: Exile a non-Victory card from the Supply.<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />When you gain this, Exile a Gold from the Supply.

Cardinal.name: Cardinal
Cardinal.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, Exiles one costing from [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]]$6, and discards the rest.

Cavalry.name: Cavalry
Cavalry.instructionsHTML: Gain 2 Horses.<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />When you gain this, '''+2 Cards''', '''+1 Buy''', and if it's your Buy phase return to your Action phase.

Coven.name: Coven
Coven.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

Each other player Exiles a Curse from the Supply. If they can't, they discard their Exiled Curses.

Destrier.name: Destrier
Destrier.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''
'''+1 Action'''
During your turns, this costs [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 less per card you've gained this turn.

Displace.name: Displace
Displace.instructionsHTML: Exile a card from your hand. Gain a differently named card costing up to [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 more than it.

Falconer.name: Falconer
Falconer.instructionsHTML: Gain a card to your hand costing less than this.<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />When any player gains a card with 2 or more types (Action, Attack, etc.), you may play this from your hand.

Fisherman.name: Fisherman
Fisherman.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''
During your turns, if your discard pile is empty, this costs [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 less.

Gatekeeper.name: Gatekeeper
Gatekeeper.instructionsHTML: At the start of your next turn, '''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3'''. Until then, when another player gains an Action or Treasure card they don't have an Exiled copy of, they Exile it.

Goatherd.name: Goatherd
Goatherd.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

You may trash a card from your hand.

'''+1 Card''' per card the player to your right trashed on their last turn.

Groom.name: Groom
Groom.instructionsHTML:
Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4. If it's an…

Action card, gain a Horse; Treasure card, gain a Silver; Victory card, '''+1 Card''' and '''+1 Action'''.

Hostelry.name: Hostelry
Hostelry.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+2 Actions'''
When you gain this, you may discard any number of Treasures, revealed, to gain that many Horses.

Kiln.name: Kiln
Kiln.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

The next time you play a card this turn, you may first gain a copy of it.

Livery.name: Livery
Livery.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3'''

This turn, when you gain a card costing [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4 or more, gain a Horse.

Mastermind.name: Mastermind
Mastermind.instructionsHTML: At the start of your next turn, you may play an Action card from your hand three times.

Paddock.name: Paddock
Paddock.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

Gain 2 Horses.

'''+1 Action''' per empty Supply pile.

Sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
Sanctuary.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
'''+1 Buy'''

You may Exile a card from your hand.

Scrap.name: Scrap
Scrap.instructionsHTML: Trash a card from your hand. Choose a different thing per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 it costs: '''+1 Card'''; '''+1 Action'''; '''+1 Buy'''; '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''; gain a Silver; gain a Horse.

Sheepdog.name: Sheepdog
Sheepdog.instructionsHTML: '''+2 Cards'''<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />When you gain a card, you may play this from your hand.

Sleigh.name: Sleigh
Sleigh.instructionsHTML: Gain 2 Horses.<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />When you gain a card, you may discard this, to put that card into your hand or onto your deck.

Snowy Village.name: Snowy Village
Snowy Village.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+4 Actions'''
'''+1 Buy'''

Ignore any further '''+Actions''' you get this turn.

Supplies.name: Supplies
Supplies.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]$1

Gain a Horse onto your deck.

Village Green.name: Village Green
Village Green.instructionsHTML: Either now or at the start of your next turn, '''+1 Card''' and '''+2 Actions'''.<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />When you discard this other than during Clean-up, you may play it.

Wayfarer.name: Wayfarer
Wayfarer.instructionsHTML:
'''+3 Cards'''

You may gain a Silver.

This has the same cost as the last other card gained this turn, if any.

Horse.name: Horse
Horse.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''
'''+1 Action'''

Return this to its pile.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Banish.name: Banish
Banish.instructionsHTML: Exile any number of cards with the same name from your hand.

Bargain.name: Bargain
Bargain.instructionsHTML: Gain a non-Victory card costing up to [[File:Coin5.png|16px|link=|alt=$5]]$5. Each other player gains a Horse.

Commerce.name: Commerce
Commerce.instructionsHTML: Gain a Gold per differently named card you've gained this turn.

Delay.name: Delay
Delay.instructionsHTML: You may set aside an Action card from your hand. At the start of your next turn, play it.

Demand.name: Demand
Demand.instructionsHTML: Gain a Horse and a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4, both onto your deck.

Desperation.name: Desperation
Desperation.instructionsHTML: Once per turn: You may gain a Curse. If you do, '''+1 Buy''' and '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''.

Enclave.name: Enclave
Enclave.instructionsHTML: Gain a Gold. Exile a Duchy from the Supply.

Enhance.name: Enhance
Enhance.instructionsHTML: You may trash a non-Victory card from your hand, to gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 more than it.

Gamble.name: Gamble
Gamble.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

Discard the top card of your deck. If it's an Action or Treasure, you may play it.

Invest.name: Invest
Invest.instructionsHTML: Exile an Action card from the Supply. While it's in Exile, when another player gains or Invests in a copy of it, '''+2 Cards'''.

March.name: March
March.instructionsHTML: Look through your discard pile. You may play an Action card from it.

Populate.name: Populate
Populate.instructionsHTML: Gain one card from each Action Supply pile.

Pursue.name: Pursue
Pursue.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

Name a card. Reveal the top 4 cards from your deck. Put the matches back and discard the rest.

Seize the Day.name: Seize the Day
Seize the Day.instructionsHTML: Once per game: Take an extra turn after this one.

Stampede.name: Stampede
Stampede.instructionsHTML: If you have 5 or fewer cards in play, gain 5 Horses onto your deck.

Toil.name: Toil
Toil.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

You may play an Action card from your hand.

Transport.name: Transport
Transport.instructionsHTML: Choose one: Exile an Action card from the Supply; or put an Action card you have in Exile onto your deck.

Way of the Butterfly.name: Way of the Butterfly
Way of the Butterfly.instructionsHTML: You may return this to its pile to gain a card costing exactly [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 more than it.

Way of the Camel.name: Way of the Camel
Way of the Camel.instructionsHTML: Exile a Gold from the Supply.

Way of the Chameleon.name: Way of the Chameleon
Way of the Chameleon.instructionsHTML: Follow this card's instructions; each time that would give you '''+Cards''' this turn, you get '''+[[File:Coin.png|16px|link=|alt=$]]$''' instead, and vice-versa.

Way of the Frog.name: Way of the Frog
Way of the Frog.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

When you discard this from play this turn, put it onto your deck.

Way of the Goat.name: Way of the Goat
Way of the Goat.instructionsHTML: Trash a card from your hand.

Way of the Mouse.name: Way of the Mouse
Way of the Mouse.instructionsHTML:
Play the set-aside card, leaving it there.
Setup: Set aside an unused non-Duration Action costing [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 or [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3.

Way of the Owl.name: Way of the Owl
Way of the Owl.instructionsHTML: Draw until you have 6 cards in hand.

Way of the Rat.name: Way of the Rat
Way of the Rat.instructionsHTML: You may discard a Treasure to gain a copy of this.

Way of the Seal.name: Way of the Seal
Way of the Seal.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''

This turn, when you gain a card, you may put it onto your deck.

Way of the Squirrel.name: Way of the Squirrel
Way of the Squirrel.instructionsHTML: '''+2 Cards''' at the end of this turn.

Way of the Turtle.name: Way of the Turtle
Way of the Turtle.instructionsHTML: Set this aside. If you did, play it at the start of your next turn.

Way of the Worm.name: Way of the Worm
Way of the Worm.instructionsHTML: Exile an Estate from the Supply.

Champion.name: Champion
Champion.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

For the rest of the game, when another player plays an Attack, it doesn't affect you, and when you play an Action card, you first get '''+1 Action'''.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Jack of All Trades.name: Jack of All Trades
Jack of All Trades.instructionsHTML: Gain a Silver. Look at the top card of your deck; you may discard it. Draw until you have 5 cards in hand. You may trash a non-Treasure card from your hand.

Royal Carriage.name: Royal Carriage
Royal Carriage.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Put this on your Tavern mat.

After you play an Action card, if it's still in play, you may call this, to replay that Action.

Bag of Gold.name: Bag of Gold
Bag of Gold.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Gain a Gold onto your deck.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Diadem.name: Diadem
Diadem.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin2.png|32px|link=|alt=$2]]$2

'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1''' per unused Action you have (Action, not Action card).

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Fairgrounds.name: Fairgrounds
Fairgrounds.instructionsHTML: Worth '''2''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per 5 differently named cards you have (round down).

Farming Village.name: Farming Village
Farming Village.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Actions'''

Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Treasure or Action card. Put that card into your hand and discard the rest.

Followers.name: Followers
Followers.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''

Gain an Estate. Each other player gains a Curse and discards down to 3 cards in hand.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Fortune Teller.name: Fortune Teller
Fortune Teller.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

Each other player reveals cards from the top of their deck until they reveal a Victory card or a Curse. They put it on top and discard the rest.

Hamlet.name: Hamlet
Hamlet.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

You may discard a card for '''+1 Action'''. You may discard a card for '''+1 Buy'''.

Harvest.name: Harvest
Harvest.instructionsHTML: Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck, then discard them. '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1''' per differently named card revealed.

Horn of Plenty.name: Horn of Plenty
Horn of Plenty.instructionsHTML: Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 per differently named card you have in play (counting this). If it's a Victory card, trash this.

Horse Traders.name: Horse Traders
Horse Traders.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''
'''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3'''

Discard 2 cards.

When another player plays an Attack card, you may first set this aside from your hand. If you do, then at the start of your next turn, '''+1 Card''' and return this to your hand.

Hunting Party.name: Hunting Party
Hunting Party.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal your hand. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a card that isn't a copy of one in your hand. Put it into your hand and discard the rest.

Jester.name: Jester
Jester.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

Each other player discards the top card of their deck. If it's a Victory card they gain a Curse; otherwise they gain a copy of the discarded card or you do, your choice.

Menagerie.name: Menagerie
Menagerie.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal your hand. If the revealed cards all have different names, '''+3 Cards'''. Otherwise, '''+1 Card'''.

Princess.name: Princess
Princess.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

This turn, cards cost [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 less.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Remake.name: Remake
Remake.instructionsHTML: Do this twice: Trash a card from your hand, then gain a card costing exactly [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 more than it.

Tournament.name: Tournament
Tournament.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Each player may reveal a Province from their hand. If you do, discard it and gain any Prize (from the Prize pile) or a Duchy, onto your deck. If no-one else does, '''+1 Card''' and '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''.

Trusty Steed.name: Trusty Steed
Trusty Steed.instructionsHTML:
Choose two: '''+2 Cards'''; or '''+2 Actions'''; or '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''; or gain 4 Silvers and put your deck into your discard pile. The choices must be different.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Young Witch.name: Young Witch
Young Witch.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''

Discard 2 cards. Each other player gains a Curse unless they reveal a Bane from their hand.

'''Setup:''' Add an extra Kingdom card pile costing [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 or [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 to the Supply. Its cards are Banes.

Advisor.name: Advisor
Advisor.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. The player to your left chooses one of them. Discard that card and put the rest into your hand.

Butcher.name: Butcher
Butcher.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Coffers'''

You may trash a card from your hand, to gain a card, costing up to [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 more than it per Coffers you spend.

Doctor.name: Doctor
Doctor.instructionsHTML:
Name a card. Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Trash the matches. Put the rest back in any order.
Overpay: Per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 overpaid, look at the top card of your deck; trash it, discard it, or put it back.

Herald.name: Herald
Herald.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an Action, play it.

'''Overpay:''' Per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 overpaid, put any card from your discard pile onto your deck.

Journeyman.name: Journeyman
Journeyman.instructionsHTML: Name a card. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal 3 cards without that name. Put those cards into your hand and discard the rest.

Masterpiece.name: Masterpiece
Masterpiece.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]$1
Overpay: Gain a Silver per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 overpaid.

Merchant Guild.name: Merchant Guild
Merchant Guild.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''

At the end of your Buy phase this turn, '''+1 Coffers''' per card you gained in it.

Soothsayer.name: Soothsayer
Soothsayer.instructionsHTML: Gain a Gold. Each other player gains a Curse, and if they did, draws a card.

Stonemason.name: Stonemason
Stonemason.instructionsHTML: Trash a card from your hand. Gain 2 cards each costing less than it.<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />'''Overpay:''' Gain 2 Action cards each costing the amount overpaid.

Taxman.name: Taxman
Taxman.instructionsHTML: You may trash a Treasure from your hand. Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards a copy of it (or reveals they can't). Gain a Treasure onto your deck costing up to [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 more than it.

Carnival.name: Carnival
Carnival.instructionsHTML: Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put one of each differently named card into your hand and discard the rest.

Coronet.name: Coronet
Coronet.instructionsHTML:
You may play a non-Reward Action from your hand twice.

You may play a non-Reward Treasure from your hand twice.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Courser.name: Courser
Courser.instructionsHTML:
Choose two different options: '''+2 Cards'''; '''+2 Actions'''; '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''; gain 4 Silvers.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Demesne.name: Demesne
Demesne.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Actions'''
'''+2 Buys'''

Gain a Gold.

Worth '''1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per Gold you have.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Farmhands.name: Farmhands
Farmhands.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+2 Actions'''
When you gain this, you may set aside an Action or Treasure from your hand, and play it at the start of your next turn.

Farrier.name: Farrier
Farrier.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
'''+1 Buy'''
'''Overpay:''' '''+1 Card''' at the end of this turn per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 overpaid.

Ferryman.name: Ferryman
Ferryman.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''
'''+1 Action'''

Discard a card.

'''Setup:''' Choose an unused Kingdom card pile costing [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 or [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4. Gain one when you gain a Ferryman.

Housecarl.name: Housecarl
Housecarl.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card''' per differently named Action card you have in play.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Huge Turnip.name: Huge Turnip
Huge Turnip.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Coffers'''

'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1''' per Coffers you have.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Infirmary.name: Infirmary
Infirmary.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''

You may trash a card from your hand.

'''Overpay:''' Play this once per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 overpaid.

Joust.name: Joust
Joust.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''

You may set aside a Province from your hand to gain any Reward to your hand. Discard the Province in Clean-up.

Renown.name: Renown
Renown.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

This turn, cards cost [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 less.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Shop.name: Shop
Shop.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''

You may play an Action card from your hand that you don't have a copy of in play.

Archive.name: Archive
Archive.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Set aside the top 3 cards of your deck face down (you may look at them). Now and at the start of your next two turns, put one into your hand.

Bustling Village.name: Bustling Village
Bustling Village.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+3 Actions'''

You may reveal a Settlers from your discard pile and put it into your hand.

Capital.name: Capital
Capital.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin6.png|32px|link=|alt=$6]]$6
'''+1 Buy'''
When you discard this from play, '''+[[File:Debt6.png|18px|link=Debt|alt=6D]]6D'''.

Catapult.name: Catapult
Catapult.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''

Trash a card from your hand. If it costs [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 or more, each other player gains a Curse. If it's a Treasure, each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

Catapult/Rocks.name: Catapult/Rocks
Catapult/Rocks.instructionsHTML: This pile starts the game with 5 copies of Catapult on top, then 5 copies of Rocks. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

Chariot Race.name: Chariot Race
Chariot Race.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

'''+1 Card''', revealing it. The player to your left reveals the top card of their deck. If your card costs more, '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1''' and '''+1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]].

Charm.name: Charm
Charm.instructionsHTML: Choose one: '''+1 Buy''' and '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''; or the next time you gain a card this turn, you may also gain a differently named card with the same cost.

City Quarter.name: City Quarter
City Quarter.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Actions'''

Reveal your hand. '''+1 Card''' per Action card revealed.

Crown.name: Crown
Crown.instructionsHTML:
If it's your Action phase, you may play an Action from your hand twice.

If it's your Buy phase, you may play a Treasure from your hand twice.

Crumbling Castle.name: Crumbling Castle
Crumbling Castle.instructionsHTML:
1 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]
When you gain or trash this, '''+1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] and gain a Silver.

Encampment/Plunder.name: Encampment/Plunder
Encampment/Plunder.instructionsHTML: This pile starts the game with 5 copies of Encampment on top, then 5 copies of Plunder. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

Emporium.name: Emporium
Emporium.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''
When you gain this, if you have at least 5 Action cards in play, '''+2''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]].

Enchantress.name: Enchantress
Enchantress.instructionsHTML:
Until your next turn, the first time each other player plays an Action card on their turn, they get '''+1 Card''' and '''+1 Action''' instead of following its instructions.

At the start of your next turn, '''+2 Cards'''

Engineer.name: Engineer
Engineer.instructionsHTML: Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4. You may trash this. If you do, gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4.

Fortune.name: Fortune
Fortune.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

Double your [[File:Coin.png|16px|link=|alt=$]]$ if you haven't yet this turn.

When you gain this, gain a Gold per Gladiator you have in play.

Encampment.name: Encampment
Encampment.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''
'''+2 Actions'''

You may reveal a Gold or Plunder from your hand. If you do not, set this aside, and return it to its pile at the start of Clean-up.

Farmers' Market.name: Farmers' Market
Farmers' Market.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

If there are '''4''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] or more on the Farmers' Market pile, take them and trash this. '''+1 Action'''

[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]$1
Worth '''1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per Castle you have.

Overlord.instructionsHTML: Play a non-Command non-Duration Action card from the Supply costing up to [[File:Coin5.png|16px|link=|alt=$5]]$5, leaving it there.

'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Wild Hunt.instructionsHTML: Choose one: '''+3 Cards''' and add '''1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] to the Wild Hunt pile; or gain an Estate, and if you do, take the  [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] from the pile.

Ritual.name: Ritual
Ritual.instructionsHTML: Gain a Curse. If you do, trash a card from your hand. '''+1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 it costs.

Triumph.instructionsHTML: Gain an Estate. If you did, '''+1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per card you've gained this turn.

Setup: Put '''6''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] here per player.

Bandit Fort.name: Bandit Fort
Bandit Fort.instructionsHTML: When scoring, '''-2''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] for each Silver and each Gold you have.

Basilica.instructionsHTML:

[[File:Coin1.png|32px|link=|alt=$1]]$1

Feodum.name: Feodum
Feodum.instructionsHTML:
Worth '''1''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]] per 3 Silvers you have (round down).

Graverobber.instructionsHTML: Choose one: Gain a card from the trash costing from [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]]$6, onto your deck; or trash an Action card from your hand and gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 more than it.

Hermit.name: Hermit
Hermit.instructionsHTML: Look through your discard pile. You may trash a non-Treasure from it or from your hand. Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3. At the end of your Buy phase this turn, if you didn't gain any cards in it, exchange this for a Madman.

Hovel.name: Hovel
Hovel.instructionsHTML: When you gain a Victory card, you may trash this from your hand.

Hunting Grounds.name: Hunting Grounds
Hunting Grounds.instructionsHTML: '''+4 Cards'''<hr style="width:66%;margin-left:17%;text-align:center;" />When you trash this, gain a Duchy or 3 Estates.

Tribute.name: Tribute
Tribute.instructionsHTML:
The player to your left reveals then discards the top 2 cards of their deck. For each differently named card revealed, if it is an…

Action Card, '''+2 Actions'''
Treasure Card, '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''
Victory Card, '''+2 Cards'''

Ironmonger.name: Ironmonger
Ironmonger.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal the top card of your deck; you may discard it. Either way, if it is an…

Action card, '''+1 Action'''
Treasure card, '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''
Victory card, '''+1 Card'''

Junk Dealer.name: Junk Dealer
Junk Dealer.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''

Trash a card from your hand.

Knights.name: Knights
Knights.instructionsHTML: Shuffle the Knights pile before each game with the Knights. Keep it face down except for the top card, which is the only one that can be bought or gained.

Madman.name: Madman
Madman.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Actions'''

Return this to the Madman pile. If you do, '''+1 Card''' per card in your hand.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Marauder.name: Marauder
Marauder.instructionsHTML: Gain a Spoils. Each other player gains a Ruins.

Market Square.name: Market Square
Market Square.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
'''+1 Buy'''
When one of your cards is trashed, you may discard this from your hand to gain a Gold.

Mercenary.name: Mercenary
Mercenary.instructionsHTML:
You may trash 2 cards from your hand. If you did, '''+2 Cards''', '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2''', and each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Overgrown Estate.name: Overgrown Estate
Overgrown Estate.instructionsHTML:
0 [[File:VP.png | 28px | bottom | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]
When you trash this, '''+1 Card'''.

Pillage.name: Pillage
Pillage.instructionsHTML: Trash this. If you did, gain 2 Spoils, and each other player with 5 or more cards in hand reveals their hand and discards a card that you choose.

Poor House.name: Poor House
Poor House.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin4.png|16px|link=|alt=$4]]$4'''

Reveal your hand. '''–'''[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 per Treasure card in your hand. (You can't go below [[File:Coin0.png|16px|link=|alt=$0]]$0.)

Procession.name: Procession
Procession.instructionsHTML: You may play a non-Duration Action card from your hand twice. Trash it. Gain an Action card costing exactly [[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1 more than it.

Rats.name: Rats
Rats.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Gain a Rats. Trash a card from your hand other than a Rats (or reveal a hand of all Rats).

When you trash this, '''+1 Card'''.

Rebuild.name: Rebuild
Rebuild.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Name a card. Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Victory card you did not name. Discard the rest, trash the Victory card, and gain a Victory card costing up to [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 more than it.

Rogue.name: Rogue
Rogue.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

If there are any cards in the trash costing from [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]]$6, gain one of them. Otherwise, each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]]$6, and discards the rest.

Sage.name: Sage
Sage.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal cards from the top of your deck until you reveal one costing [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 or more. Put that card into your hand and discard the rest.

Scavenger.name: Scavenger
Scavenger.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

You may put your deck into your discard pile. Put a card from your discard pile onto your deck.

Sir Bailey.name: Sir Bailey
Sir Bailey.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]]$6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

Sir Destry.name: Sir Destry
Sir Destry.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''

Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]]$6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

Sir Martin.name: Sir Martin
Sir Martin.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Buys'''

Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]]$6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

Sir Michael.name: Sir Michael
Sir Michael.instructionsHTML: Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]]$6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.

Sir Vander.name: Sir Vander
Sir Vander.instructionsHTML:
Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes one of them costing from [[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3 to [[File:Coin6.png|16px|link=|alt=$6]]$6, and discards the rest. If a Knight is trashed by this, trash this.
When you trash this, gain a Gold.

Spoils.name: Spoils
Spoils.instructionsHTML:
[[File:Coin3.png|32px|link=|alt=$3]]$3

When you play this, return it to the Spoils pile.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Squire.name: Squire
Squire.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''

Choose one: '''+2 Actions'''; or '''+2 Buys'''; or gain a Silver.

When you trash this, gain an Attack card.

Storeroom.name: Storeroom
Storeroom.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

Discard any number of cards, then draw that many. Then discard any number of cards for '''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1''' each.

Survivors.name: Survivors
Survivors.instructionsHTML: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Discard them or put them back in any order.

Urchin.name: Urchin
Urchin.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Each other player discards down to 4 cards in hand.

When you play another Attack card with this in play, you may first trash this, to gain a Mercenary.

Vagrant.name: Vagrant
Vagrant.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a Curse, Ruins, Shelter, or Victory card, put it into your hand.

Treasure Hunter.name: Treasure Hunter
Treasure Hunter.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''
'''+[[File:Coin1.png|16px|link=|alt=$1]]$1'''

Gain a Silver per card the player to your right gained on their last turn.

When you discard this from play, you may exchange it for a Warrior.

''(This is not in the Supply.)''

Courtyard.name: Courtyard
Courtyard.instructionsHTML:
'''+3 Cards'''

Put a card from your hand onto your deck.

Black Market.name: Black Market
Black Market.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

Reveal the top 3 cards of the Black Market deck. Play any number of Treasures from your hand. You may buy one of the revealed cards. Put the rest on the bottom of the Black Market deck in any order.

Setup: Make a Black Market deck out of different unused Kingdom cards.

Bonfire.name: Bonfire
Bonfire.instructionsHTML: Trash up to 2 Coppers you have in play.

Remodel.name: Remodel
Remodel.instructionsHTML: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a card costing up to [[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2 more than it.

Trail.name: Trail
Trail.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''
When you gain, trash, or discard this, other than in Clean-up, you may play it.

Wandering Minstrel.name: Wandering Minstrel
Wandering Minstrel.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+2 Actions'''

Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Put the Action cards back in any order and discard the rest.

Sacrifice.name: Sacrifice
Sacrifice.instructionsHTML:
Trash a card from your hand. If it's an…

Action card, '''+2 Cards''' and '''+2 Actions'''
Treasure card, '''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''
Victory card, '''+2''' [[File:VP.png | 14px | | link=Victory point | alt=VP]]

Flagship.name: Flagship
Flagship.instructionsHTML:
'''+[[File:Coin2.png|16px|link=|alt=$2]]$2'''

The next time you play a non-Command Action card, replay it.

Odysseys.name: Odysseys
Odysseys.instructionsHTML: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Old Map, Voyage, Sunken Treasure, and Distant Shore, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

Augurs.name: Augurs
Augurs.instructionsHTML: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Herb Gatherer, Acolyte, Sorceress, and Sibyl, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

Clashes.name: Clashes
Clashes.instructionsHTML: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Battle Plan, Archer, Warlord, and Territory, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

Forts.name: Forts
Forts.instructionsHTML: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Tent, Garrison, Hill Fort, and Stronghold, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

Townsfolk.name: Townsfolk
Townsfolk.instructionsHTML: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Town Crier, Blacksmith, Miller, and Elder, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

Wizards.name: Wizards
Wizards.instructionsHTML: This pile starts the game with 4 copies each of Student, Conjurer, Sorcerer, and Lich, in that order. Only the top card can be gained or bought.

Castles.name: Castles
Castles.instructionsHTML: Sort the Castle pile by cost, putting the more expensive Castles on the bottom. For a 2-player game, use only one of each Castle. Only the top card of the pile can be gained or bought.

Magpie.name: Magpie
Magpie.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a Treasure, put it into your hand. If it's an Action or Victory card, gain a Magpie.

Lost City.name: Lost City
Lost City.instructionsHTML:
'''+2 Cards'''
'''+2 Actions'''
When you gain this, each other player draws a card.

Guide.name: Guide
Guide.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Card'''
'''+1 Action'''

Put this on your Tavern mat.

At the start of your turn, you may call this, to discard your hand and draw 5 cards.

Alliance.name: Alliance
Alliance.instructionsHTML: Gain a Province, a Duchy, an Estate, a Gold, a Silver, and a Copper.

Reap.name: Reap
Reap.instructionsHTML: Gain a Gold, setting it aside. At the start of your next turn, play it.

Bury.name: Bury
Bury.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Buy'''

Put any card from your discard pile on the bottom of your deck.

Bounty Hunter.name: Bounty Hunter
Bounty Hunter.instructionsHTML:
'''+1 Action'''

Exile a card from your hand. If you didn't have a copy of it in Exile, '''+[[File:Coin3.png|16px|link=|alt=$3]]$3'''.
